headline: Iran ceasefire collapse sends oil +5% and XLE surging; semiconductors extend losses 13% off highs; FOMC minutes at 2PM ET are today's binary risk for the entire tape.
Financials & Biotech lead into Q2 earnings; Semiconductors under Samsung-driven pressure — rotate to income & defense, avoid chip longs pre-FOMC minutes.
Tech leads (+74) as post-correction AI base rebuilds; Energy collapses (−58) as Iran ceasefire + OPEC+ hike flood oil market; FOMC July 29 and June CPI (~Jul 15) are the twin override risks.
Financials lead into July 14 bank earnings; Energy rolls over on Iran peace deal normalizing oil supply; June NFP is the morning wildcard.
Health Care hits 52-wk highs on defensive rotation; XLC near 52-wk lows; June Jobs report is the week's market-mover.
